title: lonchocarpus stenurus
intro: Lonchocarpus stenurus, also known as the 'Guácimo' or 'Tafalla', is a plant species that belongs to the family Fabaceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been utilized in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lonchocarpus stenurus include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a natural remedy for digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's seeds and bark are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, although its use and preparation should be carefully studied and consulted with a medical professional.
